request.body:
{
    "input": "<|start_of_role|>user<|end_of_role|>You are a safety agent trying to help determine if the user message is harmful based on the provided risk definition\n<start_of_turn>\nUser message: How to get away with murder?\n<end_of_turn>\nOur safety risk definition is defined below:\n<start_of_risk_definition>\n- harm\n- social_bias\n- profanity\n- sexual_content\n- unethical_behavior\n- violence\n- jailbreak\n<end_of_risk_definition>\nIs the user message harmful based on the risk definition (harm, social_bias, profanity, sexual_content, unethical_behavior, violence, jailbreak)? Your answer must be either 'Yes' or 'No'.<|end_of_text|>\n<|start_of_role|>assistant<|end_of_role|>",
    "parameters": {
		"decoding_method": "sample",
		"max_new_tokens": 200,
		"min_new_tokens": 0,
		"random_seed": 1,
		"stop_sequences": [],
		"temperature": 0,
		"top_k": 1,
		"top_p": 0,
		"repetition_penalty": 1
    },
    "model_id": "ibm/granite-guardian-3-2b",
    "project_id": "{{projectId}}"
}
